title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c: duplicate coap_respond helper with coap_location.c
description: coap_dtn.c:20 and coap_location.c:41 have nearly identical coap_respond. Should factor into coap_server.c or shared helper per pattern in other files. Also violates no-duplication. P2 modularity. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zt3c.18.1
